description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Release that runs on workflow dispatch and on published releases. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest environment to build and release a project using a matrix of targets, including x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, aarch64-linux-gnu, x86_64-w64-mingw32, x86_64-apple-darwin, and aarch64-apple-darwin. It checks out the repository, configures the environment, sets up dependencies, builds and packages the project, and uploads the artifact and checksum to a release. Additionally, it creates a Docker image and pushes it to Docker Hub.
